name: 15.98" Organic Coffee Table Natural Wood - Threshold™
description:
Bring warmth and natural elegance to your space with this Organic Coffee Table from Threshold™. Supported by a wooden frame, this coffee table features an irregularly-shaped wooden tabletop and three large cylindrical legs for a balanced, sophisticated silhouette. It's perfect for your living room, study and beyond.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
